name: approve
describe: Acknowledge pending risk gate(s) on an issue or PR: posts a confirmation comment (the comment itself is the durable approval signal riskGate reads on replay) and re-triggers the paused flow. Invoked by `@kody2 approve`.

inputs.name: issue
inputs.describe: Issue number (when approving on the originating issue).

inputs.name: pr
inputs.describe: PR number (when approving on the PR side).
